message:
feat(bubbles/textarea): add cursor position accessors and byte offset methods

Add comprehensive cursor position API that enables external callers to
query and set cursor position using multiple coordinate systems:

- cursor_col(): Returns current column index (0-based character offset)
- cursor_pos(): Returns (row, col) tuple for full 2D position
- cursor_byte_offset(): Converts cursor position to byte offset into
  the flattened string representation, accounting for UTF-8 multibyte
  characters and newline separators between lines
- set_cursor_byte_offset(): Sets cursor from byte offset, with proper
  handling of:
  - Mid-character byte offsets (clamps to character boundary)
  - Newline separator bytes (places cursor at end of preceding line)
  - Offsets beyond buffer end (clamps to final position)

These methods use saturating arithmetic throughout to prevent overflow
panics on pathological inputs. The byte offset API is particularly useful
for external systems that track positions as byte offsets (e.g., LSP
servers, syntax highlighters) and need to synchronize with TextArea.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
